an1.150:1.1:
"Ye te, bhikkhave, bhikkhū anāpattiṁ āpattīti dīpenti te, bhikkhave, bhikkhū
bahujanaahitāya paṭipannā bahujanaasukhāya, bahuno janassa anatthāya ahitāya
dukkhāya devamanussānaṁ. Bahuñca te, bhikkhave, bhikkhū apuññaṁ pasavanti, te
cimaṁ saddhammaṁ antaradhāpentī"ti.
Paṭhamaṁ.
an1.160:1.1:
"Ye te, bhikkhave, bhikkhū anāpattiṁ anāpattīti dīpenti te, bhikkhave, bhikkhū bahujanahitāya paṭipannā bahujanasukhāya, bahuno janassa atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. Bahuñca te, bhikkhave, bhikkhū puññaṁ pasavanti, te cimaṁ saddhammaṁ ṭhapentī"ti.
Ekādasamaṁ.
